channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: How much a day of war on Iran costs the US
item.description: The US spent $3.7 billion in the first four days of bombing Iran. Here’s the bill.

item.title: 12 days: How 2025 Iran blueprint trapped US, Israel in longer war
item.description: Unlike the truce from last year's 12-day war, "decapitation" strikes have locked US and Israel in a war of attrition.

item.title: 4 day week, fewer car trips in Philippines as Iran fallout bites
item.description: Rising fuel prices are pushing more people to use public transport and prompting a four-day work week in Manila.

item.title: UN aid worker killed in DR Congo’s rebel-held Goma
item.description: France's president said a French aid worker with UNICEF was killed, after M23 rebels said 'combat drone' hit the city.

item.title: Iranian female footballer changes mind on Australian asylum offer
item.description: One member of the Iranian women’s football team offered asylum by Australia has decided to return home to Iran.

item.title: Iran declares US-Israeli economic, banking interests in region are targets
item.description: IRGC releases a list of offices run by top US companies with Israeli links whose technology has been used militarily.

item.title: Iran reports hospitals, civilians affected during war with US, Israel
item.description: The Iranian Red Crescent Society says nearly 20,000 civilian buildings affected, along with 77 healthcare facilities.

item.title: Iran welcome to compete in FIFA World Cup, Trump tells Infantino
item.description: FIFA's Infantino says US president 'reiterates that the Iranian team is welcome' to participate in the tournament.

item.title: Iran’s strategic patience tactic failed, what comes next could be far worse
item.description: Restraint didn't prevent war; new Iranian leadership may now look to much more dangerous approach to build a deterrent.

item.title: Video: North Korea conducts cruise missile test for destroyer
item.description: Cruise missiles were seen launching into the sky as North Korean leader Kim Jong Un oversaw naval tests.
